title: trophis zeylanica
intro: Trophis zeylanica, also known as the Cannon Ball Tree, is a flowering plant native to Sri Lanka and Southeast Asia, recognized by its large, spherical seed pods. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Trophis zeylanica include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, which are applied topically to treat various health conditions.
